channel.title: macos on Martin Proks (@mproksik)
channel.description: Recent content in macos on Martin Proks (@mproksik)

item.title: Slow autocomplete in fish-shell on macOS Big Sur
item.description: UPDATE: Upgrading to fish >3 solves the issues now. If you have decided to upgrade to the latest macOS Big Sur 10.14.6, you might have experienced an issue with slow autocomplete in fish-shell. Due to change to read-only permissions for whatis [1] the man pages can’t be updated for /usr/share/man. Therefore, the fish is switching to using apropos [2]. How to fix without updating? # create backup cp /usr/local/share/fish/functions/__fish_describe_command.fish \ /usr/local/share/fish/functions/__fish_describe_command.
